bns:Component.name: Persisted
bns:Component.bns:description: We can extend but available at Atom Level Persisted State. _Draft exists properties must be string and not boolean since we check if blank and unset

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This is a Dynamic Persisted Value and is automatically set. To Reset persisted value, Go the deployed process in the Atom, Choose "Edit Process Properties" and Remove property
definedProcessProperty.label: TimeCardPending_Draft Exists

definedProcessProperty.helpText: This is a Dynamic Persisted Value and is automatically set. To Reset persisted value, Go the deployed process in the Atom, Choose "Edit Process Properties" and Remove property
definedProcessProperty.label: TimeCard_Draft Exists
